* This is a helper Java class that provides an alternative to creating a {@code web.xml}.
 * This will be invoked only when the application is deployed to a Servlet container like Tomcat, JBoss etc.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update documentation URLs from http to https.
Update import path for JHipster constants to reflect the new package structure in JHipster 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class io.github.jhipster.config.JHipsterConstants was removed/renamed in JHipster 6; using the old import causes a compile error (cannot find symbol).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor logging to use a dynamic logger based on the JoinPoint's declaring type instead of a static class-level logger.
Update Environment.acceptsProfiles to use the new Profiles.of() API introduced in Spring Boot 2.1+.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method Environment.acceptsProfiles(String...) is deprecated and may be removed or behave differently; the new API requires Profiles.of() to compile with newer Spring Boot versions.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify log messages by removing the declaring type name, relying on the dynamic logger to provide context.
Reformat annotation arguments to span multiple lines for better readability.
Update Javadoc comments to use standard formatting and explicit type references.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
@param joinPoint join point for advice
@param e exception
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
@param joinPoint join point for advice.
@param e exception.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: Properties are configured in the {@code application.yml} file.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor class body to single-line style for empty classes.
Replace custom JHipster properties with Spring Boot's standard TaskExecutionProperties for async configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The custom JHipsterProperties class and its async configuration methods are removed or refactored in newer JHipster versions, causing compilation errors if referenced.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update constructor to inject TaskExecutionProperties instead of JHipsterProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The constructor signature must match the new field type to compile.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update executor configuration to use TaskExecutionProperties API.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update thread name prefix configuration to use TaskExecutionProperties API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old hardcoded string or property access is replaced by the standard Spring Boot property accessor.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import for ExceptionHandlingAsyncTaskExecutor to new package.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for JHipsterProperties.
Add import for TaskExecutionProperties.
Reorganize imports to follow standard ordering (java, org, tech).
Replace deprecated TimeUnit-based Duration with java.time.Duration for Ehcache expiry configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old API using org.ehcache.expiry.Duration and TimeUnit is deprecated or removed in newer Ehcache versions compatible with JDK 11, causing compilation errors or runtime warnings.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update JHipster package imports from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The io.github.jhipster.config package was renamed to tech.jhipster.config in newer JHipster versions, causing ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors if not updated.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove deprecated Spring Boot auto-configuration annotations.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: AutoConfigureAfter and AutoConfigureBefore are deprecated in newer Spring Boot versions and may cause compilation warnings or errors depending on strictness settings.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add Hibernate JCache configuration bean to integrate Ehcache with Hibernate.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Without this bean, Hibernate may not correctly use the configured JCache manager, leading to runtime caching issues or errors in newer Hibernate versions.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor cache creation to use a helper method and repository constants.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: This is a structural improvement to reduce code duplication and improve maintainability, not a compilation requirement.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add new domain entity caches for BankAccount, Label, and Operation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: These are new features added to the application, not required for JDK migration compatibility.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add Git and Build properties injection for cache key generation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: This supports enhanced cache key generation with build metadata, not a JDK migration requirement.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add custom KeyGenerator bean using PrefixedKeyGenerator.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: This provides better cache key management with build/git prefixes, not a JDK migration requirement.
